title: fix(deps): update common, image, and storage deps to afd10d8

comments.body:
### ℹ Artifact update notice

##### File name: go.mod

In order to perform the update(s) described in the table above, Renovate ran the `go get` command, which resulted in the following additional change(s):


- 1 additional dependency was updated


Details:


| **Package**                     | **Change**             |
| :------------------------------ | :--------------------- |
| `github.com/klauspost/compress` | `v1.18.1` -> `v1.18.2` |
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

@Luap99 FYI, Renovate was complaining `Could not determine new digest for update (go package go.podman.io/common).` even after https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/533 . I can do an update manually, so I hope it’s just some caching and not a long-term problem, noting this just in case it showed up elsewhere.

> @Luap99 FYI, Renovate was complaining Could not determine new digest for update (go package go.podman.io/common). even after https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/533 . I can do an update manually, so I hope it’s just some caching and not a long-term problem, noting this just in case it showed up elsewhere.

Yup, I don't get the renovate log there. I wonder if this is the case of the current commit is still consider older than 0.66.1 because the commit is pre merge point. I like to see what happens if we manually update common to the latest, hopefully renovate can get the commit updates again then.

The referenced commit for the other updates is exactly the one merging the `merge-back` PR.

> I like to see what happens if we manually update common to the latest, hopefully renovate can get the commit updates again then.

Yes, https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2770 for the record.
